communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Illinois Freedom of Information Act., I hereby request the following records:

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Illinois Freedom of Information Act (5 ILCS 140), I respectfully request access to and copies of the following public records. This request is being filed through MuckRock.com, which has agreed to facilitate the request on my behalf.

---

REQUESTER INFORMATION

Name: Jeffrey Luffman
MuckRock User: [MuckRock will insert your username]
Email: jeffrey.luffman@outlook.com
Phone: (636) 675-4864
Address: 212 Camelot Dr., Collinsville, IL 62234

---

RECORDS REQUESTED

I request the following records:

1. All records pertaining to any investigation, report, or case file involving my daughter, Daisey June Luffman (DOB: [insert date of birth]), including but not limited to:

· Any reports of suspected child abuse or neglect (indicated, unfounded, or pending)
· Any investigative records, notes, or memoranda
· Any correspondence between DCFS and any third party regarding Daisey June Luffman

2. All records pertaining to any investigation, report, or case file involving Maegen Rozycki (DOB: [insert date of birth if known]), including but not limited to:

· Any reports of suspected child abuse or neglect (indicated, unfounded, or pending)
· Any investigative records, notes, or memoranda
· Any correspondence between DCFS and any third party regarding Maegen Rozycki

3. All records pertaining to any investigation, report, or case file involving me, Jeffrey Luffman (DOB: 01/08/1975), including but not limited to:

· Any reports of suspected child abuse or neglect (indicated, unfounded, or pending)
· Any investigative records, notes, or memoranda
· Any correspondence between DCFS and any third party regarding me
· Specifically, all records related to any report that was determined to be "unfounded" or "not substantiated," including any requests I have made to have that report further investigated, and any responses to those requests [citation:source 4]

4. All communications (including emails, text messages, and any other electronic or written correspondence) between any DCFS employees, officials, or agents and any law enforcement agency (including but not limited to the Collinsville Police Department, Maryville Police Department, and Madison County Sheriff's Office) regarding me, Maegen Rozycki, or Daisey June Luffman, from January 1, 2024 to the present.

5. All communications (including emails, text messages, and any other electronic or written correspondence) between any DCFS employees, officials, or agents and any school district employees (including but not limited to Collinsville CUSD #10 and Edwardsville CUSD #7) regarding me, Maegen Rozycki, or Daisey June Luffman, from January 1, 2024 to the present.

6. All records, logs, or indexes showing any FOIA requests submitted by me or relating to me, Daisey June Luffman, or Maegen Rozycki.

---

CASE STATUS CLARIFICATION

I am aware that if an investigation is open and ongoing, records related to the investigation may be withheld [citation:source 1]. To the extent any responsive records are being withheld on this basis, please provide:

· Written notice that records are being withheld
· The basis for the withholding
· An estimated timeline for when records may become available

---

FORMAT AND FEES

Please provide all responsive records in electronic format via email or secure download link [citation:source 1].

If any fees apply, please notify me in advance.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jeffrey Luffman
